Class AsyncEffect

java.lang.Object
ch.njol.skript.lang.TriggerItem
ch.njol.skript.lang.Statement
ch.njol.skript.lang.Effect
ch.njol.skript.util.AsyncEffect
All Implemented Interfaces:
Debuggable, SyntaxElement, RuntimeErrorProducer, SyntaxRuntimeErrorProducer
public abstract class AsyncEffect extends Effect
Effects that extend this class are ran asynchronously. Next trigger item will be ran in main server thread, as if there had been a delay before.

Majority of Skript and Minecraft APIs are not thread-safe, so be careful. Make sure to add set

invalid reference 
ch.njol.skript.ScriptLoader#hasDelayBefore
to Kleenean.TRUE in the init method.

  • Method Details

    • walk

      @Nullable protected @Nullable TriggerItem walk(org.bukkit.event.Event e)
      Description copied from class: TriggerItem
      Executes this item and returns the next item to run.

      Overriding classes must call TriggerItem.debug(Event, boolean). If this method is overridden, TriggerItem.run(Event) is not used anymore and can be ignored.

      Overrides:
      walk in class TriggerItem
      Parameters:
      e - The event
      Returns:
      The next item to run or null to stop execution
